# Technology Stack

## Languages
- **Swift 5.0** — primary and only language
  - Evidence: `SWIFT_VERSION = 5.0` in project.pbxproj
  - C++ interop: `CLANG_CXX_LANGUAGE_STANDARD = "gnu++20"` (for system framework bridging)

## Frameworks

### UI
- **SwiftUI** — primary UI framework (24 files)
- **AppKit** — macOS system integration, NSWindow/NSPanel, NSView overlays (26 files)
- **WebKit** — Markdown rendering in MarkdownPreviewModel (1 file)

### System
- **Foundation** — core types, Process, UserDefaults, JSON coding (19 files)
- **AppKit** — NSColorSampler, NSColorPanel, NSPasteboard, NSEvent, NSScreen
- **Carbon / Carbon.HIToolbox** — Global hotkey registration (4 files)
- **IOKit.pwr_mgt** — Sleep prevention assertions (AwakeModel)
- **ScreenCaptureKit** — Screen capture for ruler/zoom overlays (2 files)
- **AVFoundation** — Media file metadata analysis (VideoConverter)
- **VideoToolbox** — Video codec support (VideoConverter)
- **UserNotifications** — macOS notification delivery (PomodoroTimer, WebhookNotifier)
- **UniformTypeIdentifiers** — File type identification (6 files)
- **Darwin** — Low-level system calls for port/process info (PortManager)

### External Dependencies
| Dependency | Version | Purpose |
|------------|---------|---------|
| **WhisperKit** | ≥ 0.15.0 (up to next major) | On-device speech-to-text transcription |

WhisperKit is the **only external dependency**. It transitively brings:
- swift-transformers
- swift-collections
- swift-crypto
- yyjson (C library)

### External Tools (Runtime)
- **FFmpeg** — Video/audio conversion, invoked via `Foundation.Process` (not linked)
  - Optional dependency, installable via Homebrew from within the app
  - Evidence: `FFmpegBridge.swift` manages process execution

## Package Manager
- **Swift Package Manager (SPM)** via Xcode — `XCRemoteSwiftPackageReference` in project.pbxproj
- No `Package.swift` at root — dependencies managed through Xcode project file
- Source packages resolved in `build/SourcePackages/`

## Build System
- **Xcode 16.4** — `LastSwiftUpdateCheck = 1640; LastUpgradeCheck = 1640`
- **xcodebuild** — CLI build via `release.sh`
  - Build command: `xcodebuild -project MacPowerToys.xcodeproj -scheme MacPowerToys -configuration Release -derivedDataPath ./build clean build`
- **Target**: macOS platform only
- **Deployment target**: macOS 15.5 (`MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET = 15.5`)
- **Architectures**: Universal (Apple Silicon + Intel implied by default settings)

## Dev Tools

### Build & Release
- `release.sh` — Automated release: clean build → code sign → create DMG
- `create-dmg.sh` — DMG creation with `create-dmg` tool (Homebrew) or `hdiutil` fallback
- `create-dmg` — Third-party tool for styled DMG creation

### Code Signing
- Automatic signing (`CODE_SIGN_STYLE = Automatic`)
- Optional Developer ID signing in release script
- App sandbox disabled (`com.apple.security.app-sandbox = false`)

### Linting & Formatting
- **No SwiftLint** or SwiftFormat configured
- No `.swiftlint.yml` or formatting configuration files found

### CI/CD
- **No CI/CD configuration** detected (no `.github/workflows/`, `Jenkinsfile`, etc.)
- Manual release process via shell scripts

- **macOS 15.5+** — minimum deployment target
- **Bundle identifier**: `com.rbinar.MacPowerToys`
- **Menu bar app**: `LSUIElement = true` (no Dock icon, menu bar only)
- **Entitlements**: Network client, file read/write, app-scope bookmarks (sandbox disabled)

- **Configurations**: Debug, Release
- **Previews**: Enabled (`ENABLE_PREVIEWS = YES`) but no preview providers in code
